scope.in_scope: Create new widget files under widgets/
Add or update widget metadata and business object definitions
Maintain widget-local documentation and relevant project documentation

out_of_scope.item: Take ownership of packaging configuration changes as the primary task

handoff_rules.rule: If the user asks to package a widget, validate packaging readiness at a high level only and then transition responsibility to the package manager mode.
If deployment to a BAW environment is requested, do not perform it in this mode.
